heading: My Listings
sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.

new.heading: New Listing
new.subheading: Create a new product listing visible to all buyers on the market.

edit.heading: Edit Listing
edit.statusInstruction: Update any field below and click Save changes.

rowActions.soldOutTooltip: Mark this listing as sold out
rowActions.deleteNote: If any orders reference this listing the delete will be refused — pause or mark it sold-out instead. Inquiries and quotations keep their history but lose the listing link.

fields.title: Listing Title
fields.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Natural Flake Graphite 95% C — 50 MT
fields.specsHintCustom: Custom grade — pick every mesh size that applies and fill in any spec ranges (e.g. 90–95% fixed carbon).
fields.specsHintInherited: Inherited from category. Leave a field empty to use the category default, or override it to match your batch.
fields.meshRequired: Pick at least one mesh size for custom grade.
fields.fixedCarbonHelp: Accepts a single number or range — e.g. <0>94</0>, <0>90-95</0>, <0>≥95</0>.
fields.additionalNotesPlaceholder: Spec-related context: ash content, sulphur, packing, COA references…
fields.additionalNotesHelp: Shown in the buyer's spec sheet. For batch logistics or commercial terms, use the Description field below.
fields.quantityHelp: Total amount you can ship from this lot.
fields.minOrderPlaceholder: e.g. 5 — leave blank for no minimum
fields.minOrderHelp: The smallest order a buyer can submit through inquiry. Empty = any quantity is OK. Cannot exceed available quantity.
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Commercial / logistics context: packaging, certificates, delivery options, payment preferences…
fields.descriptionHelp: Free-form pitch shown beneath the spec sheet on the listing page.

categoryCard.rangeNote: ≥ {pct}% of particles match the mesh. Override any field below if your batch differs.

inquiry.title: Submit an Inquiry
inquiry.moqError: Minimum order is {qty} for this listing.
inquiry.targetPriceHelp: Leave blank to let the seller quote first.
inquiry.messagePlaceholder: Any special requirements, packaging preferences, certifications needed...

toast.ok: Inquiry submitted! The seller will respond shortly.

toast.accepted: Default quotation sent. Buyer can accept, counter or decline.

imageUploader.atCap: Reached the {max}-image limit. Remove one from the selection below to add more.
imageUploader.compressNote: Images are resized to 720 px WebP in your browser before upload — typically < 200 KB. Up to {limit} per source file.
imageUploader.emptyLibrary: You haven't uploaded any images yet. New uploads from the other tab will show up here automatically.
imageUploader.libraryHint: Click a thumbnail to toggle it on/off this listing.
imageUploader.emptyHint: Images are optional — but a clear batch photo helps buyers trust the listing.
imageUploader.publicNotice: Images attached to active listings are publicly visible to all buyers.

toast.limit: You can attach at most {max} images per listing.
toast.extras: You can attach {remaining} more images — extras were ignored.
toast.extrasSingular: You can attach {remaining} more image — extras were ignored.
